name: Web Server
description: Nginx reverse proxy with SSL certificates and security hardening
setup_commands: Install and configure nginx as a reverse proxy
Set up certbot for Let's Encrypt SSL certificates
Run security hardening — SSH config, fail2ban, audit
Configure UFW firewall — allow 80, 443, 22 only

name: Database Server
description: PostgreSQL and Redis with automated backups
setup_commands: Install and configure PostgreSQL with secure defaults
Install and configure Redis with authentication
Set up backup-manager for daily database backups
Run security hardening for database server

name: Docker Host
description: Docker engine with compose support and container management
setup_commands: Install Docker Engine and Docker Compose
Configure Docker with recommended production settings
Set up container monitoring and log rotation

name: Full Stack
description: Complete web application stack with Nginx, PostgreSQL, Redis, Node.js, and SSL
setup_commands: Install and configure nginx as a reverse proxy
Install PostgreSQL and Redis
Install Node.js via nvm with PM2 process manager
Set up certbot for SSL certificates
Run full security hardening
Configure UFW firewall for web application

name: Monitoring
description: Prometheus metrics collection and Grafana dashboards
setup_commands: Install and configure Prometheus for metrics collection
Install Grafana and set up default dashboards
Configure monitoring exporters for system metrics

name: Security / SIEM Server
description: Vulnerability scanning, log analysis, and security monitoring
setupCommands: Run a full security audit of this server
Check if Docker is installed for running security tools
Configure the firewall to allow OpenVAS (9392) and Splunk (8000, 8089, 9997) ports
